auroraHero.headline: Ship at the speed of thought
auroraHero.subheadline: Automate your entire CI/CD pipeline with AI-driven testing and deployment. Reduce merge times by 80%.

marqueeReviews.name: Sarah Chen
marqueeReviews.body: Nexus cut our deployment time from hours to literally minutes. Incredible tool.

marqueeReviews.name: Mike Johnson
marqueeReviews.body: The AI test generation alone is worth 10x the price. Absolute game changer.

marqueeReviews.name: Elena Rodriguez
marqueeReviews.body: Finally, a CI/CD platform that doesn't require a PhD in DevOps to understand.

marqueeReviews.name: David Kim
marqueeReviews.body: We migrated our entire infra to Nexus in a weekend. Smooth sailing since.

marqueeReviews.name: Rachel Foster
marqueeReviews.body: The auto-rollback saved our production environment twice this week. Love it.

marqueeReviews.name: Tom Baker
marqueeReviews.body: Best developer experience I've seen in an infrastructure product. Period.

homePage.socialProofSubtitle: Join thousands of developers shipping better software, faster.

hero.title: The intelligent CI/CD platform for
hero.subtitle: Stop wrestling with complex YAML files. Nexus uses AI to automatically build, test, and deploy your code with zero configuration.

features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.subtitle: Powerful primitives designed to streamline your entire software development lifecycle.

items.title: Lightning Fast
items.description: Our distributed build caching guarantees sub-minute build times for any size project.

items.title: Secure by Default
items.description: Automated vulnerability scanning and secrets management built into every pipeline.

items.title: Zero Config
items.description: Nexus analyzes your repository and automatically generates the optimal deployment pipeline.

items.title: Edge Deployments
items.description: Push your application to 24 global edge locations with a single git commit.

items.title: AI Auto-Fix
items.description: When tests fail, our AI suggests the exact code change needed to fix the broken build.

items.title: Preview Environments
items.description: Instant, shareable preview environments generated automatically for every pull request.

productDemo.title: See it in action
productDemo.subtitle: Watch how Nexus simplifies complex deployment workflows.

testimonials.title: Loved by engineering teams
testimonials.subtitle: See what developers are saying about their experience with Nexus.

reviews.body: We reduced our deployment failure rate by 95% after switching to Nexus.

reviews.name: Jamie Lee
reviews.body: The AI auto-fix feature is magic. It accurately patches 80% of our test failures.

reviews.name: Jordan Smith

reviews.name: Riley Wilson
reviews.body: As a solo dev, Nexus acts like my entire DevOps team. Truly indispensable.

pricing.title: Simple, predictable

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for hobbyists and side projects.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For growing teams that need more power.

plans.name: Enterprise

items.q: How does Nexus integrate with my existing repo?
items.a: Nexus connects directly to your GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket account. We automatically detect your framework and configure the pipeline.
Yes! Nexus has first-class support for Turborepo, Nx, and custom monorepo setups with intelligent caching across packages.
Absolutely. We are SOC2 Type II certified. Your code is never stored on our servers after the build completes, and we encrypt all secrets.
Yes, if our zero-config setup doesn't meet your needs, you can provide a custom Dockerfile and we'll use that for your deployment.

items.q: What happens if I go over my build limit?
items.a: We'll softly pause new builds and notify you. We never charge overage fees automatically without your explicit consent.

dashboard.headerSubtitle: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your deployments.

featuresPage.headerSubtitle: Explore the powerful tools that make Nexus the best CI/CD platform.
featuresPage.developerDesc: We've obsessed over every detail of the developer workflow. From intelligent autocomplete in our CLI to real-time build logs in the browser, everything is designed to keep you in the flow state.
featuresPage.integrationDesc: Nexus plays nicely with your existing stack. With native integrations for Slack, Jira, Datadog, and AWS, your deployment data is exactly where you need it to be.

productPage.launchSub: Get early access to our revolutionary AI pipeline generation feature.

metadata.title: Nexus — AI-Powered CI/CD Platform
metadata.description: Automate your entire CI/CD pipeline with AI-driven testing and deployment. Ship faster with Nexus.
